comments: Approved. The execution contract is properly bounded to an architectural and engineering refactoring of the existing MCP and Worktree management codebase (src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, worktree-manager.ts, etc.). The out_of_scope constraints explicitly prevent the Orchestrator (Hermes) from making direct code edits via shell tools (cat/patch/python), enforcing the Separation of Duties (SoD) by requiring the task to be dispatched to a specialized AI Coding environment. The scope prohibits changes to core business logic semantics, ensuring this remains a structural and qualitative refactor.
